subject: WM-0133 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified scoped UI token/component changes, command placeholders remain non-authoritative and localized, no forbidden dependency/art/release-verdict changes, WM-0118 artifacts are clean, reachability helper still rejects unrelated overlays; reproduced typecheck, expected unit-filter failure, handoff/task validation, diff check, quality, and targeted non-artifact web-shell E2E.
